communities.name: Blossom Trail
communities.about: Discover Blossom Trail—a vibrant, welcoming new community tucked away in the heart of Greenacres. Here, you'll find an ideal blend of single-family homes and stylish townhomes, thoughtfully designed to accommodate a wide variety of lifestyles and preferences. Whether you seek the charm of a cozy townhome or the comfort of a spacious single-family residence, Blossom Trail offers an array of exceptional floorplans to match your unique needs. Step into comfort and ease with our thoughtfully crafted townhomes at Blossom Trail. Designed for both relaxation and practicality, these inviting homes offer two unique floor plans ranging from 1,446 to 1,472 square feet, perfectly suited for families of any size. Featuring 3 cozy bedrooms and 2.5 bathrooms, you'll find the ideal space to unwind and make lasting memories. Each townhome includes a convenient 1-car garage, providing peace of mind for your vehicle and plenty of room for your treasured belongings. If you're dreaming of more space to grow, our warm and welcoming single-family homes offer a variety of options to match every lifestyle. Choose from three innovative floorplans ranging from 2,034 to 3,072 square feet, with 3 to 5 bedrooms and 2.5 to 4 bathrooms. Each home features a spacious 2-car garage, ensuring you have ample space for multiple vehicles and all your extra storage needs. Life at Blossom Trail is about more than just beautiful homes—it's about belonging to a vibrant, caring community. Exciting amenities are coming soon, including a refreshing swimming pool, a modern clubhouse with a fitness center, and a playful tot lot, all within the safety and security of our gated neighborhood. Blossom Trail embraces the spirit of togetherness, offering residents access to gorgeous landscaped common areas and a friendly atmosphere. Whether you're enjoying a peaceful evening in your spacious home or joining neighbors for community activities, you'll quickly discover that Blossom Trail is a place where you truly belong. Experience the perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and community—welcome home to Blossom Trail.
amenities: Home is Connected Smart Home System

floorPlans.name: Bella
floorPlans.description: The Bella floorplan featured at our new community, Blossom Trail in Greenacres, Florida. The Bella floorplan offers a spacious and modern living experience in a two-story townhome. With 1,446 square feet of living space, this design includes 3 bedrooms and 2.5 bathrooms. All bedrooms are located on the second floor, providing a private and serene retreat. The primary bedroom features a large walk-in closet for ample storage and organization. The first floor includes an open-concept living area, ideal for entertaining, and a convenient one-car garage. The Bella combines comfort and functionality in a stylish layout.

floorPlans.name: Delray
floorPlans.description: The Delray floor plan is a single-story, single-family home with 2,034 square feet of living space featured in our Blossom Trail community in Greenacres, Florida. It features three bedrooms, two bathrooms, flex room and a 2-car garage. The design offers an open-concept layout, with a spacious living room that seamlessly integrates with the dining area and kitchen. This configuration is ideal for both everyday living and entertaining. The primary bedroom includes a luxurious en-suite bathroom and two walk-in closets, providing ample storage and a touch of elegance. The two additional bedrooms are conveniently located near the second bathroom. The versatile flex room, complete with its own closet, offers endless possibilities—whether you envision it as a comfortable guest bedroom, a private home office, or a creative studio, this space adapts perfectly to your needs. A standout feature of the Delray is its large, covered lanai, perfect for outdoor relaxation and gatherings. The home is available in four exterior elevations: classic, coastal, contemporary, and modern, each offering a distinct style to suit various tastes.

floorPlans.name: Ponte Vedra
floorPlans.description: Step into The Ponte Vedra at Blossom Trail our community in Greenacres, Florida. This floor plan is a two-story, single-family home with 3,072 square feet. It features 5 bedrooms, 4 bathrooms, and a 2-car garage. On the first floor, the layout includes a spacious great room, a well-equipped kitchen, and a flexible living area. A bedroom with a full bathroom is conveniently located on this level, ideal for guests or as a private suite. Upstairs, you'll find an additional living room, providing extra space for family activities or relaxation. The primary bedroom, also located on the second floor, boasts two walk-in closets and a luxurious en-suite bathroom. The remaining bedrooms share access to two additional bathrooms. The Ponte Vedra features a large, covered lanai, perfect for outdoor entertaining, and a covered entry that enhances the home's curb appeal. The exterior is available in four styles: classic, coastal, contemporary, and modern, each offering a distinctive look.

floorPlans.name: Robie
floorPlans.description: The Robie floor plan featured in our Blossom Trail community in Greenacres, Florida. The Robie offers a spacious two-story home with 2,456 square feet of well-designed living space. This layout includes four bedrooms and three bathrooms, with one bedroom conveniently located on the ground floor, ideal for guests or multi-generational living. The main level features a large open-concept great room, dining area, and kitchen, perfect for entertaining and daily living. Upstairs, you'll find a versatile additional living area, along with the master suite, which includes a generous walk-in closet and a private en-suite bathroom. Two additional bedrooms and a third full bathroom are also located on the upper floor, providing ample space for family and visitors. The Robie is available in four distinct elevations—Classic, Coastal, Contemporary, and Modern—allowing homeowners to select an exterior style that matches their personal preferences. The home also includes a two-car garage, offering convenience and extra storage space.

floorPlans.name: Terra
floorPlans.description: The Terra floorplan featured at our new community, Blossom Trail in Greenacres, Florida. The Terra is a spacious and thoughtfully designed two-story townhome spanning 1,472 square feet. This floorplan features 3 bedrooms and 2.5 bathrooms, with all bedrooms conveniently located on the upper level for added privacy. The main floor offers a bright and open living space that seamlessly connects the living and dining areas, making it perfect for both relaxation and entertaining. A well-placed half-bath on the ground floor enhances convenience for guests. The Terra also includes a single-car garage, offering practical storage and parking solutions. This floorplan combines modern comfort with functional design, making it an excellent choice for those seeking a stylish and efficient two-story townhome

communities.name: Lakeside Landing
communities.location: 106 Lakeside Landing Drive, Royal Palm Beach, FL 33411
communities.about: Introducing Lakeside Landing, a serene and inviting new townhome community nestled in the heart of Royal Palm Beach. Lakeside Landing offers thoughtfully designed homes that combine modern style with practical functionality, creating the perfect sanctuary for a variety of lifestyles. The community features spacious townhome floorplans ranging from approximately 1,446 to 1,532 square feet, with options offering 3 bedrooms and 2.5 bathrooms. Each home includes a 1-car garage, providing convenient parking and additional storage space for residents. Open-concept layouts, elegant finishes, and flexible living areas make these homes ideal for both entertaining and everyday living. Beyond your front door, Lakeside Landing offers exciting amenities designed to enhance your lifestyle. Future amenities include a sparkling swimming pool, a relaxing cabana area, and a vibrant playground — perfect for family fun and relaxation. Perfectly positioned in Royal Palm Beach, this community provides easy access to top-rated schools, parks, shopping, dining, and entertainment options. Nearby highlights include Royal Palm Beach Commons Park, The Mall at Wellington Green, and a variety of local favorites such as the Palm Beach Zoo and Lion Country Safari. Lakeside Landing is more than just a place to live — it’s a community designed for connection and enjoyment. Whether you’re spending time with neighbors by the pool or enjoying a peaceful evening at home, you’ll find comfort and a true sense of belonging here. Discover the perfect blend of modern convenience and natural beauty at Lakeside Landing.
amenities: Home is Connected Smart Home System

The first floor includes an open-concept living area, ideal for entertaining, and a convenient one-car garage. The Bondi combines comfort and functionality in a stylish layout.

This floorplan combines modern comfort with functional design, making it an excellent choice for those seeking a stylish and efficient two-story townhome.

communities.name: Baywood II
communities.about:
Introducing Baywood II, a vibrant new community thoughtfully nestled in the heart of Florida City. Baywood II offers a stunning collection of single-family homes designed to meet a variety of lifestyles and needs, making it the perfect place to call home.

Our homes feature spacious, modern layouts with floorplans ranging from approximately 2,046 to 2,790 square feet. With options offering 4 to 5 bedrooms and up to 3.5 bathrooms, these homes provide the flexibility and space needed for growing families or those who love to entertain. Each home includes either a 1- or 2-car garage, ensuring plenty of room for vehicles and additional storage.

Baywood II places a strong emphasis on design and comfort. From multi-gen living options to expansive great rooms and flex spaces, these floorplans are crafted for both functionality and style. Thoughtful architectural details and high-end finishes throughout the homes create a warm, welcoming atmosphere you’ll love coming home to.

Beyond your front door, residents will enjoy a community-focused environment with a charming tot lot coming soon — perfect for families with young children. The neighborhood is ideally located near top schools, shopping destinations, dining, entertainment, and major roadways, providing convenience at every turn.

Baywood II is more than just a neighborhood; it’s a place where connection and comfort meet. Whether you’re relaxing in your beautifully designed home or enjoying the friendly community vibe, Baywood II offers the perfect blend of modern living and timeless charm. Discover your new beginning at Baywood II in Florida City.
amenities: Home is Connected Smart Home System

floorPlans.name: Aisle
floorPlans.description:
The Aisle floor plan featured in our Baywood II community in Florida City, Florida. The Aisle features a spacious two-story single-family home with 2,046 square feet of living space. On the ground floor, you'll find an open-concept layout with a welcoming foyer leading to a large living area, dining space, and a well-equipped kitchen. A convenient half-bath is located on this level. The attached two-car garage offers direct access to the home.

Upstairs, the design includes four bedrooms and two full bathrooms. The master suite is a private retreat with a sizable bedroom, a walk-in closet, and an en-suite bathroom. The additional three bedrooms are comfortably sized and share a second full bathroom. This layout provides a clear separation between living areas and private spaces, making it ideal for family living.

The Aisle is designed with a covered entry and offers four exterior elevations: classic, coastal, contemporary, and modern, each providing a unique look to match your style preferences.

floorPlans.name: Sapole II
floorPlans.description:
Introducing the Sapole II floor plan featured in our Baywood II community in Florida City, Florida. The Sapole II features a two-story home with 2,085 square feet of versatile living space. This design includes four bedrooms and three bathrooms, with one bedroom conveniently located on the ground floor. The main level also boasts a welcoming covered entry, an open-concept great room, dining area, and kitchen—ideal for entertaining and family gatherings.

Upstairs, you'll find an additional living area, along with the master suite, which includes a walk-in closet and an en-suite bathroom. Two more bedrooms and a third bathroom are also situated on the upper floor, providing ample space for family and guests.

The Sapole II offers four distinctive elevations—Classic, Coastal, Contemporary, and Modern—allowing homeowners to choose the exterior style that best suits their taste. The attached one-car garage adds practicality and additional storage options.

floorPlans.name: Robie
floorPlans.description:
The Robie floor plan featured in our Baywood II community in Florida City, Florida. The Robie offers a spacious two-story home with 2,499 square feet of well-designed living space. This layout includes five bedrooms and three bathrooms, with one bedroom conveniently located on the ground floor, ideal for guests or multi-generational living. The main level features a large open-concept great room, dining area, and kitchen, perfect for entertaining and daily living.

Upstairs, you'll find a versatile additional living area, along with the master suite, which includes a generous walk-in closet and a private en-suite bathroom. Three additional bedrooms and a third full bathroom are also located on the upper floor, providing ample space for family and visitors.

The Robie is available in four distinct elevations—Classic, Coastal, Contemporary, and Modern—allowing homeowners to select an exterior style that matches their personal preferences. The home also includes a two-car garage, offering convenience and extra storage space.

floorPlans.name: Crosscourt
floorPlans.description:
Our most sought after, Crosscourt floorplan featured in our Baywood II community in Florida City, Florida. The Crosscourt is a two-story, single-family home with 2,790 square feet of space. It features 4 bedrooms and 3.5 bathrooms, along with a spacious 2-car garage.

The Crosscourt is our multi-gen floorplan that is designed to accommodate multiple generations under one roof, offering a harmonious blend of privacy and shared living spaces.

With the multi-gen accommodations on the first floor, the remaining 4 bedrooms are located upstairs along with a spacious laundry room. In addition to the laundry and bedrooms, you’ll find an additional living room perfect for providing extra space for family activities or relaxation.

The primary bedroom also located on the second floor is accompanied by a large walk-in closet and a luxurious en-suite bathroom.

The Crosscourt offers four exterior elevations to choose from: classic, coastal, contemporary, and modern, each offering a distinctive look.

communities.name: Capistrano
communities.about:
Capistrano is a beautiful single-family home community located in the charming city of Cutler Bay, Florida. This exceptional neighborhood is designed with modern living in mind, offering spacious one-story homes that cater to a variety of lifestyles. Each home in Capistrano is thoughtfully crafted with four bedrooms and three bathrooms, providing ample space for growing families, professionals, or anyone seeking a comfortable, luxurious living environment.

The homes in Capistrano stand out for their contemporary and modern architectural styles, blending sleek lines and innovative designs with the warmth and functionality that every homeowner desires. Each residence features an expansive three-car garage, offering plenty of room for vehicles, storage, or even a home workshop. The modern and contemporary elevations create a striking curb appeal that enhances the overall aesthetic of the community.

Located in Cutler Bay, Capistrano offers residents the perfect balance of suburban tranquility and convenience. Enjoy easy access to top-rated schools, shopping, dining, and outdoor activities. Whether you’re looking for a family-friendly neighborhood or a peaceful retreat, Capistrano provides a welcoming and vibrant environment where homeowners can truly feel at home.
amenities: Home is Connected Smart Home System

floorPlans.name: Destin
floorPlans.description:
Welcome to the Destin, a stunning single-story floor plan designed for both comfort and style. Offering 4 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, and a spacious 3-car garage, this 2,315 square-foot home is perfect for families or those who love to entertain.

The gorgeous design of the great room is perfect for both relaxing and entertaining, with ample space for various layouts. The well-appointed kitchen offers ample storage and counter space and is conveniently located near the elegant dining room ready for family dinners or special occasions.

The luxurious master suite offers a serene retreat with a large bedroom area and a beautifully designed en-suite bathroom. The additional three bedrooms are spacious and versatile, perfect for a growing family, guests, or even a home office.

Step outside through the sliding doors to enjoy the covered lanai, an ideal space for outdoor dining, relaxing, or entertaining. The Destin combines functional design with thoughtful details, making it the perfect choice for your next home.

floorPlans.name: Fraser
floorPlans.description:
The Fraser floorplan featured in our new community called Capistrano in Cutler Bay, Florida. The Fraser is a spacious single-family home with 2,533 square feet of living space, featuring four bedrooms and three bathrooms.

The layout includes a large great room that flows seamlessly into a well-appointed kitchen with a central island and adjacent dining area. The master suite, located at the rear of the home for added privacy, includes two generous walk-in closets and a luxurious en-suite bathroom. The remaining three bedrooms are positioned on the opposite side of the house, offering comfortable accommodations and convenient access to the additional bathrooms.

The Fraser floorplan also boasts a sizable lanai, ideal for outdoor relaxation and entertainment, and a three-car garage providing ample storage and parking space. This thoughtfully designed floor plan caters to both functionality and comfort, making it a perfect choice for families.

communities.name: Hadley Place
communities.about:
Welcome to Hadley Place, a charming townhome community nestled in the heart of Florida City, Florida. This inviting neighborhood offers two thoughtfully designed floorplans, each featuring 3 spacious bedrooms and 2 full bathrooms, with sizes ranging from 1,446 to 1,472 square feet. Ideal for families, first-time homebuyers, and those looking to downsize, these townhomes are both functional and stylish. Each residence comes with a convenient 1-car garage, offering ample storage space or protection for your vehicle.

Hadley Place boasts an array of amenities, including a welcoming tot lot where children can play and explore in a safe, fun environment. The community is designed for easy living, with modern finishes, open-concept layouts, and energy-efficient features that help create a comfortable and low-maintenance lifestyle. The community's prime location in Florida City provides residents with easy access to shopping, dining, and entertainment options, as well as proximity to major highways and the stunning natural attractions of the Florida Keys and Everglades.

Whether you're enjoying a quiet afternoon at home or taking advantage of nearby recreational opportunities, Hadley Place offers the perfect balance of comfort, convenience, and community. Come explore this wonderful townhome community and find your ideal place to call home in beautiful Florida City!

communities.name: Parker Pointe
communities.about:
Introducing Parker Pointe, a vibrant and inviting new community nestled in the heart of Homestead. Parker Pointe offers a harmonious blend of single-family homes and townhomes, creating an environment that caters to a diverse range of lifestyles and preferences. Whether you're looking for a cozy townhome or a spacious single-family residence, Parker Pointe has a floorplan to suit your needs.

Our townhomes are designed with both comfort and functionality in mind. With five distinct floorplans ranging from 1,785 to 1,940 square feet, these homes feature 3 to 4 bedrooms and 2.5 to 3 bathrooms, ensuring ample space for families of all sizes. Each townhome includes a convenient 1-car garage, perfect for storing your vehicle and additional belongings.

For those seeking more room to grow, our single-family homes offer a variety of options to fit any lifestyle. With four innovative floorplans ranging from 2,085 to 2,878 square feet, these homes provide 4 to 5 bedrooms and 2.5 to 3.5 bathrooms. Each single-family home includes a generous 2-car garage, making it easy to accommodate multiple vehicles and extra storage.

Parker Pointe is more than just a place to live; it's a community with exciting amenities on the horizon. Residents will soon enjoy a refreshing swimming pool, a modern clubhouse, and a fun-filled splash pad. Outdoor enthusiasts and families will appreciate the planned dog park, playground, and well-maintained parks.

Parker Pointe is designed with community in mind, offering residents access to beautifully landscaped common areas and a welcoming atmosphere. Whether you’re enjoying a quiet evening in your spacious home or taking advantage of the close-knit community spirit, Parker Pointe is a place where you’ll feel right at home. Discover the perfect balance of comfort, convenience, and community at Parker Pointe.
amenities: Home is Connected Smart Home System

The Sheraton combines modern design with functional living, making it an excellent choice for families.

communities.name: Hunters Manor
communities.about:
Step into a new standard of living with this exclusive collection of single-family homes in Pompano Beach, Florida in our new community, Hunters Manor. Designed for those who appreciate both space and style, these homes offer five thoughtfully crafted floorplans ranging from 1,739 to 2,707 square feet of air-conditioned comfort. Choose from 4 to 5 bedrooms and 2 to 3 bathrooms, with options for a 1 or 2-car garage, ensuring the perfect fit for your family.

Each home features solid concrete block construction, offering lasting durability and peace of mind. Inside, the modern kitchens come equipped with stainless steel appliances that perfectly complement the sleek design. The ceramic tile flooring throughout the first floor adds a touch of sophistication while remaining low maintenance.

Designed for the modern homeowner, each residence is equipped with Home is Connected®, offering cutting-edge America’s Smart Home℠ technology. Control key features of your home with ease, ensuring comfort and convenience at your fingertips. The paver entry walkways, driveways, and lanais enhance curb appeal, providing a warm and inviting entry to your new home.

Located in the heart of Pompano Beach, Hunters Manor offers more than just a home. With convenient access to shopping, dining, beautiful parks, and the beach, this location allows you to enjoy a vibrant and active lifestyle. Whether you’re unwinding at the beach or exploring local dining hotspots, every day offers something new to enjoy. Find your perfect home and embrace the vibrant lifestyle that awaits you at Hunters Manor.
amenities: Home is Connected Smart Home System

floorPlans.description:
The Merrit Floorplan is a beautifully designed single-story home at Hunters Manors in Pompano Beach, Florida. Featuring 4 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, and a 2-car garage this home is perfectly designed for comfortable living. The open concept floorplan, designed with functionality in mind, seamlessly connects the living room, dining area, and kitchen, creating a welcoming space perfect for both everyday living and entertaining. The spacious bedrooms offer a tranquil retreat, with the master suite boasting a luxurious bathroom and generous walk-in closet.

Designed to accommodate a variety of lifestyles, the Merrit floorplan is available in four distinctive design styles to suit your personal taste: Classic, Coastal, Contemporary, and Modern. Each style brings its own unique touch, allowing you to personalize your home and reflect your individual style.

Whether you're hosting friends or simply relaxing at home, this floorplan offers a perfect balance of practicality and elegance.

floorPlans.name: Parker
floorPlans.description:
Discover the Parker floorplan at Hunters Manors in Pompano Beach, Florida. A two-story home that perfectly blends space, comfort, and style. With 5 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, a 2-car garage, and an upstairs living area, this home is ideal for growing families or those who love to entertain.

The open-concept main level seamlessly connects the kitchen, dining area, and living room, creating a warm and welcoming atmosphere for both everyday living and special gatherings. A versatile bedroom and full bathroom on the first floor offer flexible space for guests, a home office, or multigenerational living.

Upstairs, you'll find four additional bedrooms—including a spacious owner’s suite with a luxurious bathroom and expansive walk-in closet. The second floor living area offers the perfect spot for a media room, game room, or a cozy family lounge.

To reflect your personal style, the Parker is available in four distinctive exterior design styles: Classic, Coastal, Contemporary, and Modern—each bringing its own character and charm.

Whether you’re hosting guests or enjoying a quiet night in, the Parker floorplan delivers the perfect balance of functionality and flair in a location you’ll love to call home.

floorPlans.name: Robie

This layout includes four bedrooms and three bathrooms, with one bedroom conveniently located on the ground floor, ideal for guests or multi-generational living. The main level features a large open-concept great room, dining area, and kitchen, perfect for entertaining and daily living.

Upstairs, you'll find a versatile additional living area, along with the master suite, which includes a generous walk-in closet and a private en-suite bathroom. Two additional bedrooms and a third full bathroom are also located on the upper floor, providing ample space for family and visitors.

The Robie is available in four distinct elevations—Classic, Coastal, Contemporary, and Modern—allowing homeowners to select an exterior style that matches their personal preferences. The home also includes a two-car garage, offering convenience and extra storage space.

floorPlans.name: Sapole
floorPlans.description:
Introducing the Sapole floor plan featured in our Hunters Manor community in Pompano Beach, Florida. The Sapole features a two-story home with 2,085 square feet of versatile living space. This design includes four bedrooms and three bathrooms, with one bedroom conveniently located on the ground floor. The main level also boasts a welcoming covered entry, an open-concept great room, dining area, and kitchen—ideal for entertaining and family gatherings.

Upstairs, you'll find an additional living area, along with the master suite, which includes a walk-in closet and an en-suite bathroom. Two more bedrooms and a third bathroom are also situated on the upper floor, providing ample space for family and guests.

The Sapole offers four distinctive elevations—Classic, Coastal, Contemporary, and Modern—allowing homeowners to choose the exterior style that best suits their taste. The attached one-car garage adds practicality and additional storage options.

communities.name: Vineyards
communities.about:
Introducing Vineyards, a vibrant and welcoming new community nestled in the heart of Davie. Vineyards offers a perfect blend of spacious single-family homes and thoughtfully designed townhomes, creating a versatile environment that suits a wide variety of lifestyles and preferences. Whether you’re looking for an elegant two-story single-family home or a modern townhome with flexible spaces, Vineyards has a floorplan to match your needs.

Our townhomes are designed with comfort and modern living in mind. With several distinct floorplans ranging from approximately 1,738 to 1,929 square feet, these homes feature 3 to 4 bedrooms, flex rooms, and 2.5 to 3 bathrooms. Each townhome includes a convenient 1-car garage, providing ease and practicality for daily living.

For those who desire more room to grow, our single-family homes offer generous living spaces to accommodate any lifestyle. Floorplans range from 1,739 to 3,059 square feet, with options offering 4 to 5 bedrooms and 2 to 4 bathrooms. Each single-family home includes a spacious 2-car garage, perfect for multiple vehicles and additional storage needs.

Vineyards is more than just a collection of homes — it’s a community designed for connection and enjoyment. Residents will appreciate amenities such as a charming tot lot, and beautifully landscaped green spaces, fostering a true neighborhood atmosphere.

Whether you’re spending a quiet evening in your thoughtfully crafted home or enjoying a stroll around the community’s serene surroundings, Vineyards offers the perfect balance of comfort, convenience, and community spirit. Discover the lifestyle you’ve been dreaming of at Vineyards in Davie.

floorPlans.name: Bonnet
floorPlans.description: The Bonnet floorplan featured in our Vineyards community in Davie, Florida. The Bonnet is a thoughtfully designed two-story townhome offering 1,738 square feet of comfortable living space. Featuring 3 bedrooms and 2.5 bathrooms, this floorplan places all bedrooms on the upper level, each equipped with a walk-in closet for ample storage and organization. The main floor is designed for modern living, with a spacious and open layout that integrates the living and dining areas, ideal for both relaxation and entertaining. A convenient powder room on the ground floor enhances guest accessibility and practicality. Additionally, the Bonnet includes a single-car garage, providing both parking and extra storage space. This is the only townhome in Vineyards with a covered lanai. This floorplan combines functional design with stylish elements, making it a perfect choice for those seeking a blend of comfort and convenience in a two-story townhome.

floorPlans.name: Gilliam
floorPlans.description:
The Gilliam floorplan featured in our Vineyards community in Davie, Florida. The Gilliam is a spacious two-story townhome offering 1,863 square feet of well-designed living space. This floorplan features 4 bedrooms and 2.5 bathrooms, with all bedrooms located upstairs to ensure privacy. The primary suite includes a generous closet, while the remaining bedrooms are also well-sized with ample storage.

The ground floor boasts a versatile layout with a welcoming covered entry, a great room perfect for casual gatherings, and a separate living room ideal for more formal occasions. A convenient powder room is also located on the main level, enhancing guest accessibility.

Additionally, the Gilliam includes a single-car garage, providing practical storage and parking solutions. This floorplan combines functionality with style, offering a comfortable and flexible living environment for families of all sizes.

floorPlans.name: Merrit
floorPlans.description:
The Merrit Floorplan is a beautifully designed single-story home in our Vineyards community in Davie, Florida. Featuring 4 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, and a 2-car garage this home is perfectly designed for comfortable living. The open concept floorplan, designed with functionality in mind, seamlessly connects the living room, dining area, and kitchen, creating a welcoming space perfect for both everyday living and entertaining. The spacious bedrooms offer a tranquil retreat, with the master suite boasting a luxurious bathroom and generous walk-in closet.

Designed to accommodate a variety of lifestyles, the Merrit floorplan is available in four distinctive design styles to suit your personal taste: Classic, Coastal, Contemporary, and Modern. Each style brings its own unique touch, allowing you to personalize your home and reflect your individual style.

Whether you're hosting friends or simply relaxing at home, this floorplan offers a perfect balance of practicality and elegance.

floorPlans.name: Ponte Vedra
floorPlans.description:
Step into The Ponte Vedra at our Vineyards community in Davie, Florida. This floor plan is a two-story, single-family home with 3,072 square feet. It features 5 bedrooms, 4 bathrooms, and a 2-car garage.

On the first floor, the layout includes a spacious great room, a well-equipped kitchen, and a flexible living area. A bedroom with a full bathroom is conveniently located on this level, ideal for guests or as a private suite.

Upstairs, you'll find an additional living room, providing extra space for family activities or relaxation. The primary bedroom, also located on the second floor, boasts two walk-in closets and a luxurious en-suite bathroom. The remaining bedrooms share access to two additional bathrooms.

The Ponte Vedra features a large covered lanai, perfect for outdoor entertaining, and a covered entry that enhances the home's curb appeal. The exterior is available in four styles: classic, coastal, contemporary, and modern, each offering a distinctive look.

floorPlans.name: Robie
floorPlans.description:
The Robie floor plan featured in our Vineyards community in Davie, Florida. The Robie offers a spacious two-story home with 2,499 square feet of well-designed living space. This layout includes four bedrooms and three bathrooms, with one bedroom conveniently located on the ground floor, ideal for guests or multi-generational living. The main level features a large open-concept great room, dining area, and kitchen, perfect for entertaining and daily living.

Upstairs, you'll find a versatile additional living area, along with the master suite, which includes a generous walk-in closet and a private en-suite bathroom. Two additional bedrooms and a third full bathroom are also located on the upper floor, providing ample space for family and visitors.

The Robie is available in four distinct elevations—Classic, Coastal, Contemporary, and Modern—allowing homeowners to select an exterior style that matches their personal preferences. The home also includes a two-car garage, offering convenience and extra storage space.

floorPlans.name: Stranahan
floorPlans.description: The Stranahan floorplan featured in our Vineyards community in Davie, Florida. The Stranahan is a spacious two-story townhome offering 1,929 square feet of well-designed living space. This versatile floorplan features 4 bedrooms and 3 bathrooms, with a convenient layout that includes one bedroom and a full bathroom on the ground floor, ideal for guests or multi-generational living. Upstairs, the remaining bedrooms provide ample space and privacy, with the master suite offering an en-suite bathroom for added comfort. The design emphasizes both functionality and style, with a thoughtfully planned living area that ensures comfort throughout. The Stranahan also includes a single-car garage, providing practical storage and parking options. This floorplan seamlessly combines modern amenities with a flexible layout, making it a perfect choice for families or those who value both space and convenience.

floorPlans.name: Westland
floorPlans.description: The Westland floorplan featured in our Vineyards community in Davie, Florida. The Westland is a beautifully designed two-story townhome offering 1,908 square feet of versatile living space. This floorplan features 4 bedrooms and 2.5 bathrooms with a spacious living room, enhancing the overall openness and comfort of the home. All four bedrooms are located upstairs, each equipped with walk-in closets for ample storage and organization. The Westland also includes a single-car garage, providing both parking and additional storage options. This floorplan combines modern convenience with stylish design, making it an excellent choice for families or those who appreciate a blend of space, functionality, and natural light.
